component.name: commons-collections
component.description: Types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

component.name: commons-io
component.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

component.name: byte-buddy-agent
component.description: The Byte Buddy agent offers convenience for attaching an agent to the local or a remote VM.

component.name: jna
component.description: Java Native Access

component.name: jackson-jaxrs-base
component.description: Pile of code that is shared by all Jackson-based JAX-RS providers.

component.name: reload4j
component.description: Reload4j revives EOLed log4j 1.x

component.name: scala-reflect
component.description: Reflection Library for the Scala Programming Language

component.name: jersey-hk2
component.description: HK2 InjectionManager implementation

component.name: snappy-java
component.description: snappy-java: A fast compression/decompression library

component.name: jackson-jaxrs-json-provider
component.description: Functionality to handle JSON input/output for JAX-RS implementations (like Jersey and RESTeasy) using standard Jackson data binding.

component.name: jakarta.validation-api
component.description: Jakarta Bean Validation API

component.name: objenesis
component.description: A library for instantiating Java objects

component.description: Jersey core Servlet 2.x implementation

component.name: mockito-core
component.description: Mockito mock objects library core API and implementation

component.name: plexus-utils
component.description: A collection of various utility classes to ease working with strings, files, command lines, XML and more.

component.description: jackson-module-scala

license.name: GNU General Public License (GPL), version 2, with the Classpath exception

component.name: scala-logging_2.13
component.description: scala-logging

component.name: commons-math3
component.description: The Apache Commons Math project is a library of lightweight, self-contained mathematics and statistics components addressing the most common practical problems not immediately available in the Java programming language or commons-lang.

component.name: zstd-jni
component.description: JNI bindings for Zstd native library that provides fast and high compression lossless algorithm for Java and all JVM languages.

component.name: jakarta.annotation-api
component.description: Jakarta Annotations API

component.name: javax.annotation-api
component.description: Common Annotations for the JavaTM Platform API

component.name: jetty-security
component.description: Jetty security infrastructure

component.name: commons-lang3
component.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: activation
component.description: The JavaBeans(TM) Activation Framework is used by the JavaMail(TM) API to manage MIME data

component.name: commons-digester
component.description: The Digester package lets you configure an XML to Java object mapping module which triggers certain actions called rules whenever a particular pattern of nested XML elements is recognized.

component.name: commons-beanutils
component.description: Apache Commons BeanUtils provides an easy-to-use but flexible wrapper around reflection and introspection.

component.name: jersey-container-servlet
component.description: Jersey core Servlet 3.x implementation

component.name: caffeine
component.description: A high performance caching library

component.name: jsr305
component.description: JSR305 Annotations for Findbugs

component.name: metrics-core
component.description: Metrics is a Java library which gives you unparalleled insight into what your code does in production. Metrics provides a powerful toolkit of ways to measure the behavior of critical components in your production environment.

component.name: slf4j-api
component.description: The slf4j API

component.name: opentelemetry-proto
component.description: Java Bindings for the OpenTelemetry Protocol (OTLP)

component.name: audience-annotations
component.description: Annotations for defining API boundaries and tools for managing javadocs

component.name: jackson-datatype-jdk8
component.description: Add-on module for Jackson (http://jackson.codehaus.org) to support JDK 8 data types.

component.name: commons-cli
component.description: Apache Commons CLI provides a simple API for presenting, processing and validating a command line interface.

component.name: commons-logging
component.description: Apache Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well known logging systems.

component.name: argparse4j
component.description: The command-line parser library based on Python's argparse

component.name: jmh-core
component.description: The jmh is a Java harness for building, running, and analysing nano/micro/macro benchmarks written in Java and other languages targeting the JVM.

license.name: GNU General Public License (GPL), version 2, with the Classpath exception

component.description: ${project.name}

component.description: Injection API (JSR 330) version ${javax.inject.version} repackaged as OSGi bundle

component.description: scala-java8-compat

component.name: jackson-module-afterburner
component.description: Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) extension module used to enhance performance using bytecode generation to replace use of Reflection for field access and method calls

component.name: javax.ws.rs-api
component.description: Java API for RESTful Web Services

component.name: reflections
component.description: Reflections - Java runtime metadata analysis

component.name: lz4-java
component.description: Java ports and bindings of the LZ4 compression algorithm and the xxHash hashing algorithm

component.name: jakarta.ws.rs-api
component.description: Jakarta RESTful Web Services API

component.description: ZooKeeper jute

component.name: byte-buddy
component.description: Byte Buddy is a Java library for creating Java classes at run time. This artifact is a build of Byte Buddy with all ASM dependencies repackaged into its own name space.

component.name: javassist
component.description: Javassist (JAVA programming ASSISTant) makes Java bytecode manipulation simple. It is a class library for editing bytecodes in Java.

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.description: Asynchronous API

component.description: The core jetty server artifact.

component.name: pcollections
component.description: A Persistent Java Collections Library

component.name: jose4j
component.description: The jose.4.j library is a robust and easy to use open source implementation of JSON Web Token (JWT) and the JOSE specification suite (JWS, JWE, and JWK). It is written in Java and relies solely on the JCA APIs for cryptography. Please see https://bitbucket.org/b_c/jose4j/wiki/Home for more info, examples, etc..

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

component.name: jackson-module-jaxb-annotations
component.description: Support for using JAXB annotations as an alternative to "native" Jackson annotations, for configuring data-binding.

component.name: zookeeper
component.description: ZooKeeper server

component.description: ${project.name}

component.name: mockito-inline
component.description: Mockito preconfigured inline mock maker (intermediate and to be superseeded by automatic usage in a future version)

component.name: osgi-resource-locator
component.description: Used by various API providers that rely on META-INF/services mechanism to locate providers.

component.name: protobuf-java
component.description: Core Protocol Buffers library. Protocol Buffers are a way of encoding structured data in an efficient yet extensible format.

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: jetty-servlet
component.description: Jetty Servlet Container

component.name: rocksdbjni
component.description: RocksDB fat jar that contains .so files for linux32 and linux64 (glibc and musl-libc), jnilib files for Mac OSX, and a .dll for Windows x64.

component.description: ${project.name}

component.name: commons-validator
component.description: Apache Commons Validator provides the building blocks for both client side validation and server side data validation. It may be used standalone or with a framework like Struts.

component.description: Support for reading and writing CSV-encoded data via Jackson abstractions.
